Upcoming NAISS courses¶

NAISS offers a wide range of courses, workshops and seminars that are free to all users. Training is provided by staff from NAISS branches across Sweden.

Training events and courses open for registration¶

For more information and registration, please click the titles below to go to the hosting branch event pages. This list is updated frequently.

Date Course Location Info
27 - 28 August AWK Workshop online AWK is typically used for data extraction and reporting. The workshop introduces AWK and demonstrates its flexibility
14 - 18 September NAISS introduction training week online Aimed at new users, covering: Linux, connecting, file transfer, software use, batchsystems, Running AI/ML workloads and sensitive data handling
2 October File Transfer 102 online Transfering files to and from NAISS systems. The workshop focuses on practical, hands-on use of terminal-based tools.
12 - 13 October Basic Singularity/Apptainer workshop online Introduction to the basic concepts of containerized software environment solutions within the Singularity framework

CodeRefinery¶

NAISS is actively participating in the CodeRefinery training network. The network teaches all the essential tools which are usually skipped in academic education so everyone can make full use of software, computing, and data with focus on reusability, reproducibility, and openness. The standard tools workshop is well known in Nordic academic circles.

Date Workshop Location Info
22 - 24 September CodeRefinery tools workshop online  Intro to git and collaborative git, on GitHub
29 September - 1 October CodeRefinery tools workshop online Reproducible research, Social Coding, AI Assisted Research Software Development, tools for documentation and testing, and modular code development

The CodeRefinery workshops will open registration soon.

Made with Zensical
